title: Subscribe + share Documented (NYC immigration)
syn: Stay informed on ICE activities Support NYC's immigrant communities through real-time journalism
desc: Subscribe + share Documented. NYC immigration-focused journalism that hits ICE operations in real time.

title: Subscribe + share The Lever
syn: Stay informed on corporate influence Join a community fighting for transparency and accountability
desc: Subscribe + share The Lever. Sirota's outfit on dark money and corporate corruption — best independent reporting.

title: Submit + share a press-freedom incident
syn: Document attacks on press freedom. Share incidents to build a powerful public record and drive change
desc: Submit + share press-freedom incidents. Public record of every press attack — fuels lawsuits and policy fights.

title: Download free protest art
syn: Access high-quality protest designs for your next march. Create impact with your message
desc: Download free protest art. Pro-grade posters from Shepard Fairey and others; print at home for any march.

title: Download free anti-fascist posters
syn: Grab bold designs to amplify your message Print, share, and stand against fascism
desc: Download free anti-fascist posters. Co-op of printmakers; high-quality designs for protests, walls, and zines.

title: Download educational graphics
syn: Empower your activism with visuals Print and share graphics on critical issues today
desc: Download educational graphics. Hand-drawn movement art — climate, mining, Trump-era issues. Free to print.

title: Submit an embroidery piece
syn: Stitch your resistance into history Join the collective memory and showcase your art
desc: Embroider a Trump quote and ship to the project archive. Permanent record + group-show exhibitions.

title: Apply to programs
syn: Join a community of activists to explore and rehearse powerful protest techniques
desc: Apply for forum theater + virtual workshops. Boal's method for rehearsing political action — practice the protest.

title: Use the tactical-prank toolkit
syn: Unleash satire to disrupt corporate deception Follow the Yes Men's playbook for impactful pranks
desc: Use the Yes Men's tactical-prank toolkit. Step-by-step satire playbook — they impersonated execs to expose climate lies.

title: Refer an artist at risk
syn: Support artists in peril Join the movement to provide urgent legal and relocation aid
desc: Refer an artist at risk. Solidarity for persecuted artists — visa, legal, and relocation support during crackdowns.

title: Find your local mutual aid network
syn: Connect with your community support group Offer help to a neighbor in need this week
desc: Find your local mutual aid network. Pick one neighbor to support this week — money, food, rides, anything.

title: Volunteer as a translator for asylum seekers
syn: Help asylum seekers navigate the system Your language skills can change lives
desc: Translate documents for asylum seekers. Hours of your time can prevent a deportation; bilingual = high-value.

title: Boost Sludge's dark-money & GOP-donor reporting
syn: Stay informed with Sludge's investigations Share facts to challenge dark-money narratives
desc: Subscribe to Sludge and share their campaign-finance investigations on social. Counter dark-money disinfo with sourced reporting.

title: Boost Bolts Magazine's local-democracy reporting
syn: Support grassroots journalism that holds local officials accountable. Share vital insights on democracy and elections
desc: Subscribe to Bolts and share their local DA, sheriff, and election-admin coverage. Local democracy is where Trump-era threats land first.

title: Boost Drop Site News on Trump's wars & civil liberties
syn: Stay informed on critical issues Amplify independent analysis from Drop Site
desc: Subscribe to Drop Site (ex-Intercept staff) and share their war and civil-liberties coverage. Counter the war-machine narrative.

title: Boost More Perfect Union's worker-power journalism
syn: Empower labor voices through impactful journalism Support anti-corporate reporting that challenges Trump’s backers
desc: Subscribe to More Perfect Union and share their worker-power video reporting. Anti-corporate journalism that hits Trump donors directly.

title: Boost Inkstick's anti-war foreign-policy reporting
syn: Support independent journalism for a new foreign policy perspective Help amplify anti-war narratives and challenge the status quo
desc: Subscribe to Inkstick and share their non-DC foreign policy coverage. Counter the bipartisan war-and-empire consensus.

title: Read + share data
syn: Explore key wealth data from Inequality.org and amplify the message against economic injustice
desc: Read + share wealth-concentration data. Inequality.org has the charts that make 'eat the rich' arguments concrete.

title: Sign up for op-ed training
syn: Join a workshop to amplify your voice Learn to write impactful op-eds for change
desc: Sign up for op-ed training. They've placed thousands of underrepresented voices in major papers — works.

title: Use weekly LTE prompts (formerly Sister District)
syn: Mobilize your voice with targeted letters Boost local resistance and influence state politics
desc: Use weekly LTE prompts targeting state-level fights. Coordinated submissions to district papers move ratings.

title: Use the Two-Minute Activist tool
syn: Quickly craft and send letters to the editor Leverage women's organization strength for impactful change
desc: Use AAUW's two-minute activist tool. LTE templates + submission. Women's-org muscle behind every signature.

title: Use the LTE writer tool
syn: Craft your message for local impact Engage your community with climate-focused letters
desc: Use Sierra Club's LTE writer. Climate-focused, chapter-targeted, gets published in regional papers regularly.

title: Use LTE templates with verified statistics
syn: Craft compelling letters to the editor Leverage verified stats from Inequality.org to amplify your message
desc: Use Inequality.org's LTE templates with verified stats. Drop the chart links and let editors do the rest.

title: Call peer crisis line: 877-565-8860
desc: Trans peer crisis line: 877-565-8860. No police dispatch, no involuntary holds. Save the number for your friends.

title: Reach via 24/7 chat / text / phone
syn: Support LGBTQ youth in crisis anytime. Share this vital resource for those who need it most
desc: LGBTQ youth crisis line — 24/7 chat, text, phone. Save it; share it with any kid in your life feeling targeted.

title: Call peer hotline / chat
syn: Connect with supportive peers for LGBTQ folks facing tough times
desc: Peer hotline + chat for LGBTQ folks of any age. Calm peer support, not crisis — for the bad-day moments.

title: Text HOME to 741741
syn: Reach out for support when you need it most Share this resource with those in crisis
desc: Trained counselor 24/7 — free, anonymous, no police dispatch. Save it now; share with anyone queer, trans, or targeted.

title: Find a peer mental-health chapter
syn: Join a supportive community for mental health resources and connection
desc: Find a peer mental-health chapter. Campus + online network — good fit for college students or new grads.

title: Find a free virtual support group
syn: Join peers for emotional support and coping strategies Weekly online meetings, no insurance required
desc: Find a free virtual support group. Family + peer mental-health support; weekly, online, no insurance needed.

title: Sign up to run for office (under 40, progressive)
syn: Join the movement to reshape leadership Get support for your campaign and make your voice heard
desc: Sign up to run for office. Under 40, progressive — they handle the hard parts, you focus on the door knocks.

title: Apply to candidate training (women)
syn: Join a powerful network of women leaders Get trained to run for office and make change
desc: Apply for free women's candidate training. They've run thousands of women — training is rigorous, free, ongoing.

title: Apply to candidate training (Dem women)
syn: Join a six-month training program to empower Democratic women leaders and candidates
desc: Apply to candidate training for Democratic women. Six-month program; alumni include 1,200+ elected officials.

title: Apply to candidate training (Black women)
syn: Empower Black women to lead. Join our candidate training program and break barriers in politics
desc: Apply to Black women's candidate training. Pipeline org for the most underrepresented group in elected office.

title: Find DOJ-accredited rep training
syn: Join the fight against mass deportation Get trained as a DOJ-accredited representative today
desc: Free DOJ-accredited rep training. Trump's mass deportation needs more accredited reps — non-lawyers can do this.

title: Sell your Tesla
syn: Join the movement to weaken Musk's influence. Sell your Tesla and make a statement today
desc: Tesla Takedown's headline ask — divest from Musk's company. Trade in, sell to a dealer, or post on Bring-A-Trailer. Every sale chips at the Musk valuation that funds his political project.

title: Dump your TSLA stock
syn: Take a stand against Musk's influence Divest your Tesla shares and push for change
desc: Tesla Takedown asks anyone holding Tesla shares — directly, in a 401(k), or via index funds — to divest. Switch to a Musk-free ETF; pressure your fund manager.

title: Find a Tesla Takedown protest near you
syn: Join local activists in peaceful protests against Tesla's support for Trump. Find your nearest event and make your voice heard
desc: Map and calendar of weekly Tesla showroom protests across the US. Pick the closest, RSVP, show up. Peaceful, sign-holding, First Amendment.

title: Plan a Tesla Takedown protest in your city
syn: Organize a local protest against Tesla's support for Trump Use our toolkit to mobilize your community and make an impact
desc: No protest in your area yet? Tesla Takedown has a host-an-action toolkit — permits, sign templates, safety protocol, comms scripts. Pick a Saturday and start a chapter.

title: 50501 Joplin / Citizens Against Tyranny — monthly meeting
desc: Sat May 16, 2:00 PM. Joplin, MO. 50501 Joplin and Citizens Against Tyranny Network's monthly chapter meeting. Local organizing in deep-red Missouri.

title: BloNo IL community meeting & cookout (Central IL Iron Front)
syn: Join local antifascists for strategy discussions and community building. Bring a dish to share and connect
desc: Sun May 17, 2:00 PM. Bloomington, IL. Central Illinois Iron Front community meeting + cookout. Antifascist organizing meets potluck. Bring a side dish.

title: We The People of Ohio — Constitution day in Mentor
desc: Sun May 17, 8:00 AM. Mentor, OH. Constitution-themed visibility action. Peaceful, free, family-friendly. Hosted by Kathy.

title: Subscribe to Blaire Erskine's Substack
syn: Get weekly doses of sharp satire and exclusive insights from a top voice against Trump
desc: The newsletter version of Blaire Erskine's deadpan-news-anchor MAGA satire — bonus fake interviews skewering Trump talking points, behind-the-scenes on her viral TikTok reels, no algorithm gating. Direct to your inbox.

title: Color Your Way Through Trump 2.0 with Fresh Prints' Anti-Trump Resistance Coloring Book
syn: Unwind and resist with every stroke Grab your coloring tools and get creative
desc: Indie coloring book full of anti-Trump pages — calming, shareable craft for tense news days. Pages are also sold as standalone prints.

title: Build (and Whack) a Trumpiñata with Carlyn Yandle's Collaborative How-To
syn: Create a symbol of resistance with this DIY guide from artist Carlyn Yandle
desc: Artist Carlyn Yandle's step-by-step guide to building a Trump piñata — perfect for a protest prep party, a neighborhood block gathering, or just your living room ceiling.

title: Color Your Way Through Resistance With Fresh Prints's Anti-Trump Coloring Book
desc: Bluesky's @freshprintsdesign sells a No-Kings-themed anti-Trump resistance coloring book on Etsy — protest art, calm-the-nerves coloring, and gift-able resistance you can spread at any meeting or march.
